caption:
Name the cost before you try to fix the person. corporate managers: more discipline will fix exhaustion is not the whole story.

For corporate managers, the hidden cost often shows up as answering after-hours messages while telling yourself it is just one more thing.

Mechanism: What looks like willpower collapse is often recovery debt wearing a professional mask.

Try this: Name one leak, one recovery signal, and one task that can become smaller today. Run the ninety-second reset: close the loop, lower your jaw, and take three slow double-inhale sighs before choosing the next task. Then choose the next visible action, not the entire life plan.

Save this stillness practice for the next loud hour.
— Stillness Press
